# maib SDK for Node.js

> TypeScript SDK for maib merchant APIs — checkout, e-commerce payments, request to pay, MIA QR, and open banking.

## Documentation

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Instructions for AI coding agents
- [README.md](README.md): Project overview and quick start

## Packages

### @maib/merchants (umbrella)
- [README](packages/merchants/README.md)
- [SDK Reference](packages/merchants/docs/sdk-reference.md)

### @maib/checkout
- [README](packages/checkout/README.md)
- [SDK Reference](packages/checkout/docs/sdk-reference.md)
- [API Reference](packages/checkout/docs/api-reference.md)

### @maib/ecommerce
- [README](packages/ecommerce/README.md)
